meta.title: mefaltauna — trade and buy Panini World Cup 2026 stickers
meta.description: The easiest way to complete your Panini World Cup 2026 album. Trade stickers with fellow collectors or buy them in Colombian pesos.

hero.title: How many are you missing?
hero.subtitle: Trade and buy the stickers you need to complete your Panini album. Built in Colombia, for real collectors.

how.title: Three steps. No fluff.
how.intro: Creating an account is free. You only pay when you're ready to list stickers for trade or sale. Zero commission per trade.

mark.title: Mark your album
mark.body: Tell us which stickers you have and which you're missing. Your digital album syncs instantly.
mark.detail: Works offline. Mark duplicates with one tap, missing ones with a double tap. Your progress uploads as soon as you're back online.

match.title: Find someone with your missing one
match.body: We match your list against other collectors and surface the perfect trades.
match.detail: Filter by city, reputation, or sticker type (player, badge, legend, foil). We notify you when someone nearby has a sticker you need.

trade.title: Trade or buy
trade.body: Chat in-app, agree on shipping or meet-up, and complete your album one sticker at a time.
trade.detail: Chat is secure and logged. When both parties confirm the trade or purchase, both gain reputation and your profile levels up.

payment.a: We're integrating Wompi so you can pay in Colombian pesos with card, PSE or Nequi. Until then, signing up and using the app is free.

shipping.a: Each user decides. The most common option in LATAM is in-person delivery in a public spot or shipping via Servientrega. mefaltauna doesn't handle shipping itself — reputation protects users who deliver.

safety.q: How do you protect me from fraud?
safety.a: Every user has public reputation built from completed trades. You can report and block anyone who doesn't deliver. Low-reputation accounts are filtered by default.

panini.q: Does it work with any Panini 2026 album?
panini.a: Yes — the catalog covers the official FIFA World Cup 2026 Panini sticker album: players, badges, legends and shiny specials.

pricing.title: Pay only when you publish.
pricing.subtitle: Creating an account is free. We only charge when you're ready to list stickers for trade or sale. Zero commission per trade.
pricing.disclaimer: Payments in Colombian pesos via Wompi · Coming soon

preview.title: Every sticker, a story.
preview.body: Vintage album typography, verified player data, and one click to trade or buy it.

album.title: My Album
album.subtitle: Tap a sticker to add it. Tap again to mark duplicates.

publish.title: Publish a sticker
publish.subtitle: Only stickers you have in duplicate can be published. Choose what you want in exchange or set a price.

noDuplicates.title: No duplicates yet
noDuplicates.body: Head back to your album and tap a sticker twice to mark it as a duplicate.

step1.title: 1 · Pick a duplicate
step1.subtitle: Only stickers you have in duplicate or more show up here.

photoStep.title: 2 · Photo of the sticker
photoStep.subtitle: Optional but recommended — helps build trust with whoever wants it.

step3.priceSubtitle: Colombian pesos. Zero commission from mefaltauna.
step3.wantsTitle: What do you want in exchange?
step3.wantsSubtitle: Open, any sticker from a team, or one specific sticker.

errors.no_duplicates: You don't have that sticker in duplicate anymore.
errors.missing_price: Enter a valid price in COP.
errors.invalid_wants: Pick what you want in exchange.

errors.upload_failed: Couldn't upload the photo. Try again.

inbox.title: Messages
inbox.emptyBody: When someone writes you about a sticker, or you reach out to someone in the feed, your conversations show up here.

feed.title: Live
feed.subtitle: Every new sticker listed appears here instantly.
feed.empty: No listings yet. Be the first.

matches.title: Every match. Every team.
matches.subtitle: Filter by team or by group. Local time in Colombia (UTC-5).
matches.notice: Schedule being integrated with the official FIFA source. What you see below is a structural sample — final data lands before launch.
matches.empty: No matches with that filter. Try another team or group.

signIn.title: Sign in
signIn.subtitle: We'll email you a magic link. No password to remember.
signIn.disclaimer: By continuing you accept the terms of use. No spam, no ads.

errors.send_failed: Couldn't send the link. Try again in a moment.
errors.not_configured: Auth isn't configured yet. Contact the mefaltauna team.
errors.callback_failed: The link expired or was already used. Request a new one below.

checkEmail.title: Check your email
checkEmail.body: We sent a magic link. Open it from the same device you're browsing on.
checkEmail.hint: Not in your inbox? Check spam or promotions.

footer.tagline: We design and ship digital products with UX and AI.
